body: Fixed: signalapi O(N) scan (86% CPU, per-file max-seq cache), form4-watcher XSL prefix 0-transactions (stripped to raw XML), form4-watcher 4MB body limit (32MB), SQLite COMMENT= migration market_data_daily. All 14 processes healthy, 479 insider transactions, 4071 governance signals.
title: FatBaby system health check: 4 fixes applied
